title: Shut it Keith Rush
description: React fast to shut-themed prompts and chain combos before time runs out.

howToPlayJson.title: Shut it Keith Rush
howToPlayJson.objective: Score as many points as possible by mastering the shut loop before the timer ends.
steps: Hit valid prompts quickly and avoid mistakes.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Build combo streaks for bigger points. Highest score wins.
tips: Keep your finger close to the main action lane.
Use sound and color to maintain rhythm.
